caption: A man with dark skin, wearing glasses and a whimsical, tall, grey spiked wig, is seated in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a brown bow tie and tan suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. The background is a wall featuring various framed photographs and clothing items on mannequins, including a yellow "LEE" garment. To the left and right of the man, on-screen logos appear featuring a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". The man remains in a consistent position throughout the sequence, slightly shifting his facial expression as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
